'''Camen Spaceport''' was a civilian [[Space station/Legends|space station]]. Two members of [[Dunari]]'s coalition escaped the [[Hurrim Base|Hurrim's asteroid base]] in the the [[Lambda-class T-4a shuttle/Legends|Lambda-class T-4a shuttle]] ''[[Merte]]'' under heavy pursuit of [[Preybird-class starfighter|Preybird]] starfighters. [[Alliance High Command/Legends|Alliance High Command]] sent a strike force of two [[RZ-1 A-wing interceptor/Legends|A-wings]] to cover the retreat until the [[Shuttle/Legends|shuttle]] reached [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]].

==Routes==
The ships that were present when this happened were:
*[[C-3 passenger liner]] ''[[Olleppac]]''
*[[Ferryboat liner]] ''[[Wind Runner]]''
*Ferryboat liner ''[[Bulton Cruises]]''
*[[Xiytiar-class heavy transport/Legends|Xiytiar-class transport]] ''[[K-Com]]''
*3 [[MB-C1 medium transport]]s [[Aratech (transport group)|''Aratech'']]
*[[Virella Systems]] [[Virella Systems cargo freighter|Cargo freighter]] ''[[Tomlas Ore]]''

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: X-Wing Alliance]]'' {{1st}}
